creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Tobias C. Berner from comment #1)

On my system (with Qt 5.12 and creator just built now via poudriere), LANG seems to have no effect on QtCreator. Neither zh_CN nor de nor pt_BR give me anything other than English in the UI. Tools -> Options -> Environment contains a drop-down of languages, defaulting to <System Language>. The only other option in that drop-down is English.
